title: quercus × hispanica var. dentata
intro: Quercus × hispanica var. dentata is a deciduous tree or shrub that is a hybrid of the holm oak and the Iberian oak. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus × hispanica var. dentata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicines that promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
